hero.description: We are developing a new generation mobile platform that supports Turkey's independent artists and brings their works to readers. Join our email list to be among the first to know.

features.subtitle: What Does Nekota Offer?
features.description: We are building an ecosystem where art and technology meet, growing with the power of the community.

support.title: Independent Artist Support
support.description: A platform that protects the labor of local talents, secures copyrights, and brings their works to a wide audience.

revenue.title: Fair Revenue Model
revenue.description: A sustainable earning system that ensures artists receive a transparent and fair share of the income from their works.

reading.title: Immersive Reading Experience
reading.description: Ad-free subscription options that let you focus on the story and a smart recommendation engine that works according to your reading habits.

community.title: Live and Interactive Community
community.description: An ecosystem where you can communicate directly with other readers and artists through comments, forums, and our Discord server.

library.title: Wide Content Library
library.description: A rich content archive consisting of both local independent comics and webtoons, and unforgettable classic manga and anime.

user_centric.title: User-Centric Development
user_centric.description: A transparent development process that grows with continuous feedback, shaped according to your needs, and where the community has a say.

ecosystem.title: Building an Ecosystem Together.
ecosystem.description: We noticed that talented independent comic and webtoon artists in Turkey do not receive the value they deserve. We established Nekota as a new generation digital publishing platform that puts artists at the center. Our goal is to create a sustainable ecosystem where artists can get rewarded for their efforts and readers discover new worlds.

news.title: News from the Nekota Universe
news.description: Latest developments, collaborations, and our community announcements. On this blog, you can find all the stories about the birth of a project.

cta.title: Join Nekota!
cta.description: Join our email list to stay informed about all developments from the launch of our application to artist announcements and new content.

hero.title: Who are We?
hero.description: We are a new generation publisher, a passionate group of developers, designers, and storytellers who believe in the power of independent art. We came together to create the platform we always wanted to see: an area where Turkey's artists can develop and readers can discover unique worlds.

details.subtitle: NEKOTA
details.title: Established by Artists, for Artists.
details.description:
We noticed that talented independent comic and webtoon artists in Turkey do not receive the value they deserve. We established Nekota as a new generation digital publishing platform that puts artists at the center.

Our goal is to create a sustainable ecosystem where artists can get rewarded for their efforts, copyrights are protected, and readers discover new worlds. We believe every line, every story has a value and we work to bring this value to the audience it deserves.

hero.title: Mission and Vision
hero.description: We set out with the goal of creating a technology-enhanced, fair, and sustainable digital publishing ecosystem that puts art and artists at the center.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Our core mission is to empower independent artists and storytellers in Turkey. We aim to provide them with a modern platform where they can deliver their works to wide audiences with a fair revenue model, protect their copyrights, and use their creative freedom to the fullest. For readers, we aim to create an area where they can easily access rich and diverse content produced by local talents and become part of a live community.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: Our vision is to make Nekota the heart of Turkey's independent digital comic and webtoon scene. We dream of being not just a reading platform, but also a cultural center where artists and readers come together, interact, and grow together. In the long term, we aim to be a recognized and respected brand that represents original stories and artists from Turkey in the international arena.

hero.title: Roadmap
hero.description: We are developing Nekota with a transparent and community-focused process. Here is an overview of what awaits us in the future.

phases.phase: Phase 1: Beta Testing and Launch (2026 Q3)
phases.title: Beta Process and Official Launch
phases.description: Commencement of beta testing and official launch of the application before the end of Q3.

phases.phase: Phase 2: iOS and macOS Release (2026 Q4)
phases.title: Apple Ecosystem Expansion
phases.description: iOS and macOS versions reaching users and making the platform accessible on all Apple devices.

phases.title: Institutionalization and 100,000 Users
phases.description: Completion of the incorporation process, making the revenue distribution system faster and more efficient, and reaching the target of 100,000 active users.

phases.title: Localization Fund
phases.description: Creation of a special fund to support Turkish translation and dubbing teams and increasing the quality of content.

phases.phase: Phase 5: Original Content and Studio Support (2028 Q1)
phases.title: Nekota Originals and Amateur Studios
phases.description: Supporting amateur studios for Nekota original content through financial and equipment aid, funding, or hiring as employees; supporting the production of small studios and protecting copyrights.

phases.title: Nearby Geography Operations
phases.description: Expanding to nearby geographical regions, starting with Cyprus and Azerbaijan.

phases.phase: Phase 7: Global Market Entry (2030 and Beyond)
phases.title: Global Vision
phases.description: Expanding into European and North American markets to make the platform a global brand.
